channel.title: The Style Edit
channel.description: Everyday style tips, trends & outfit ideas

item.title: 미니멀 시크: 여름 옷장을 단순하게 만드는 법
Building a Capsule Wardrobe: Essentials That Go With Everything
item.description: A capsule wardrobe makes getting dressed effortless. Here are the timeless essentials that mix and match into dozens of outfits — and how to build yours.

item.title: Summer Dress Outfit Ideas: Effortless Looks for Warm Days
item.description: One dress, endless outfits. Here are easy summer dress outfit ideas — from beach days to dinner — plus how to style dresses for hot weather with ease.

item.title: How to Dress for Your Body Shape: A Simple Guide
item.description: Flatter your figure with clothes that fit you best. A simple, judgment-free guide to dressing for your body shape — and why fit matters more than rules.

item.title: How to Style Linen: Cool, Effortless Summer Outfits
item.description: Linen is the ultimate hot-weather fabric. Here's how to style linen for summer — outfit ideas, what to pair it with, and tips to keep it looking crisp.
